tools.name: app.getApplicationApiUsage
tools.description: Get API usage by application for time frame specified. You can go as far back as 30 days ago, and can ask for up to a 48 hour window of time in a single request. You must be authenticated with at least the ReadUserData permission to access this endpoint.

tools.name: app.getBungieApplications
tools.description: Get list of applications created by Bungie.

tools.name: communityContent.getCommunityContent
tools.description: Returns community content.

tools.name: content.getContentById
tools.description: Returns a content item referenced by id

tools.name: content.getContentByTagAndType
tools.description: Returns the newest item that matches a given tag and Content Type.

tools.name: content.getContentType
tools.description: Gets an object describing a particular variant of content.

tools.name: content.rssNewsArticles
tools.description: Returns a JSON string response that is the RSS feed for news articles.

tools.name: content.searchContentByTagAndType
tools.description: Searches for Content Items that match the given Tag and Content Type.

tools.name: content.searchContentWithText
tools.description: Gets content based on querystring information passed in. Provides basic search and text search capabilities.

tools.name: content.searchHelpArticles
tools.description: Search for Help Articles.

tools.name: destiny2.awaGetActionToken
tools.description: Returns the action token if user approves the request.

tools.name: destiny2.awaInitializeRequest
tools.description: Initialize a request to perform an advanced write action.

tools.name: destiny2.awaProvideAuthorizationResult
tools.description: Provide the result of the user interaction. Called by the Bungie Destiny App to approve or reject a request.

tools.name: destiny2.clearLoadout
tools.description: Clear the identifiers and items of a loadout.

tools.name: destiny2.equipItem
tools.description: Equip an item. You must have a valid Destiny Account, and either be in a social space, in orbit, or offline.

tools.name: destiny2.equipItems
tools.description: Equip a list of items by itemInstanceIds. You must have a valid Destiny Account, and either be in a social space, in orbit, or offline. Any items not found on your character will be ignored.

tools.name: destiny2.equipLoadout
tools.description: Equip a loadout. You must have a valid Destiny Account, and either be in a social space, in orbit, or offline.

tools.name: destiny2.getActivityHistory
tools.description: Gets activity history stats for indicated character.

tools.name: destiny2.getCharacter
tools.description: Returns character information for the supplied character.

tools.name: destiny2.getClanAggregateStats
tools.description: Gets aggregated stats for a clan using the same categories as the clan leaderboards. PREVIEW: This endpoint is still in beta, and may experience rough edges. The schema is in final form, but there may be bugs that prevent desirable operation.

tools.name: destiny2.getClanBannerSource
tools.description: Returns the dictionary of values for the Clan Banner

tools.name: destiny2.getClanLeaderboards
tools.description: Gets leaderboards with the signed in user's friends and the supplied destinyMembershipId as the focus. PREVIEW: This endpoint is still in beta, and may experience rough edges. The schema is in final form, but there may be bugs that prevent desirable operation.

tools.name: destiny2.getClanWeeklyRewardState
tools.description: Returns information on the weekly clan rewards and if the clan has earned them or not. Note that this will always report rewards as not redeemed.

tools.name: destiny2.getCollectibleNodeDetails
tools.description: Given a Presentation Node that has Collectibles as direct descendants, this will return item details about those descendants in the context of the requesting character.

tools.name: destiny2.getDestinyAggregateActivityStats
tools.description: Gets all activities the character has participated in together with aggregate statistics for those activities.

tools.name: destiny2.getDestinyEntityDefinition
tools.description: Returns the static definition of an entity of the given Type and hash identifier. Examine the API Documentation for the Type Names of entities that have their own definitions. Note that the return type will always *inherit from* DestinyDefinition, but the specific type returned will be the requested entity type if it can be found. Please don't use this as a chatty alternative to the Manifest database if you require large sets of data, but for simple and one-off accesses this should be handy.

tools.name: destiny2.getDestinyManifest
tools.description: Returns the current version of the manifest as a json object.

tools.name: destiny2.getHistoricalStats
tools.description: Gets historical stats for indicated character.

tools.name: destiny2.getHistoricalStatsDefinition
tools.description: Gets historical stats definitions.

tools.name: destiny2.getHistoricalStatsForAccount
tools.description: Gets aggregate historical stats organized around each character for a given account.

tools.name: destiny2.getItem
tools.description: Retrieve the details of an instanced Destiny Item. An instanced Destiny item is one with an ItemInstanceId. Non-instanced items, such as materials, have no useful instance-specific details and thus are not queryable here.

tools.name: destiny2.getLeaderboards
tools.description: Gets leaderboards with the signed in user's friends and the supplied destinyMembershipId as the focus. PREVIEW: This endpoint has not yet been implemented. It is being returned for a preview of future functionality, and for public comment/suggestion/preparation.

tools.name: destiny2.getLeaderboardsForCharacter
tools.description: Gets leaderboards with the signed in user's friends and the supplied destinyMembershipId as the focus. PREVIEW: This endpoint is still in beta, and may experience rough edges. The schema is in final form, but there may be bugs that prevent desirable operation.

tools.name: destiny2.getLinkedProfiles
tools.description: Returns a summary information about all profiles linked to the requesting membership type/membership ID that have valid Destiny information. The passed-in Membership Type/Membership ID may be a Bungie.Net membership or a Destiny membership. It only returns the minimal amount of data to begin making more substantive requests, but will hopefully serve as a useful alternative to UserServices for people who just care about Destiny data. Note that it will only return linked accounts whose linkages you are allowed to view.

tools.name: destiny2.getPostGameCarnageReport
tools.description: Gets the available post game carnage report for the activity ID.

tools.name: destiny2.getProfile
tools.description: Returns Destiny Profile information for the supplied membership.

tools.name: destiny2.getPublicMilestoneContent
tools.description: Gets custom localized content for the milestone of the given hash, if it exists.

tools.name: destiny2.getPublicMilestones
tools.description: Gets public information about currently available Milestones.

tools.name: destiny2.getPublicVendors
tools.description: Get items available from vendors where the vendors have items for sale that are common for everyone. If any portion of the Vendor's available inventory is character or account specific, we will be unable to return their data from this endpoint due to the way that available inventory is computed. As I am often guilty of saying: 'It's a long story...'

tools.name: destiny2.getUniqueWeaponHistory
tools.description: Gets details about unique weapon usage, including all exotic weapons.

tools.name: destiny2.getVendor
tools.description: Get the details of a specific Vendor.

tools.name: destiny2.getVendors
tools.description: Get currently available vendors from the list of vendors that can possibly have rotating inventory. Note that this does not include things like preview vendors and vendors-as-kiosks, neither of whom have rotating/dynamic inventories. Use their definitions as-is for those.

tools.name: destiny2.insertSocketPlug
tools.description: Insert a plug into a socketed item. I know how it sounds, but I assure you it's much more G-rated than you might be guessing. We haven't decided yet whether this will be able to insert plugs that have side effects, but if we do it will require special scope permission for an application attempting to do so. You must have a valid Destiny Account, and either be in a social space, in orbit, or offline. Request must include proof of permission for 'InsertPlugs' from the account owner.

tools.name: destiny2.insertSocketPlugFree
tools.description: Insert a 'free' plug into an item's socket. This does not require 'Advanced Write Action' authorization and is available to 3rd-party apps, but will only work on 'free and reversible' socket actions (Perks, Armor Mods, Shaders, Ornaments, etc.). You must have a valid Destiny Account, and the character must either be in a social space, in orbit, or offline.

tools.name: destiny2.pullFromPostmaster
tools.description: Extract an item from the Postmaster, with whatever implications that may entail. You must have a valid Destiny account. You must also pass BOTH a reference AND an instance ID if it's an instanced item.

tools.name: destiny2.reportOffensivePostGameCarnageReportPlayer
tools.description: Report a player that you met in an activity that was engaging in ToS-violating activities. Both you and the offending player must have played in the activityId passed in. Please use this judiciously and only when you have strong suspicions of violation, pretty please.

tools.name: destiny2.searchDestinyEntities
tools.description: Gets a page list of Destiny items.

tools.name: destiny2.searchDestinyPlayerByBungieName
tools.description: Returns a list of Destiny memberships given a global Bungie Display Name. This method will hide overridden memberships due to cross save.

tools.name: destiny2.setItemLockState
tools.description: Set the Lock State for an instanced item. You must have a valid Destiny Account.

tools.name: destiny2.setQuestTrackedState
tools.description: Set the Tracking State for an instanced item, if that item is a Quest or Bounty. You must have a valid Destiny Account. Yeah, it's an item.

tools.name: destiny2.snapshotLoadout
tools.description: Snapshot a loadout with the currently equipped items.

tools.name: destiny2.transferItem
tools.description: Transfer an item to/from your vault. You must have a valid Destiny account. You must also pass BOTH a reference AND an instance ID if it's an instanced item. itshappening.gif

tools.name: destiny2.updateLoadoutIdentifiers
tools.description: Update the color, icon, and name of a loadout.

tools.name: fireteam.getActivePrivateClanFireteamCount
tools.description: Gets a count of all active non-public fireteams for the specified clan. Maximum value returned is 25.

tools.name: fireteam.getAvailableClanFireteams
tools.description: Gets a listing of all of this clan's fireteams that are have available slots. Caller is not checked for join criteria so caching is maximized.

tools.name: fireteam.getClanFireteam
tools.description: Gets a specific fireteam.

tools.name: fireteam.getMyClanFireteams
tools.description: Gets a listing of all fireteams that caller is an applicant, a member, or an alternate of.

tools.name: fireteam.searchPublicAvailableClanFireteams
tools.description: Gets a listing of all public fireteams starting now with open slots. Caller is not checked for join criteria so caching is maximized.

tools.name: forum.getCoreTopicsPaged
tools.description: Gets a listing of all topics marked as part of the core group.

tools.name: forum.getForumTagSuggestions
tools.description: Gets tag suggestions based on partial text entry, matching them with other tags previously used in the forums.

tools.name: forum.getPoll
tools.description: Gets the specified forum poll.

tools.name: forum.getPostAndParent
tools.description: Returns the post specified and its immediate parent.

tools.name: forum.getPostAndParentAwaitingApproval
tools.description: Returns the post specified and its immediate parent of posts that are awaiting approval.

tools.name: forum.getPostsThreadedPaged
tools.description: Returns a thread of posts at the given parent, optionally returning replies to those posts as well as the original parent.

tools.name: forum.getPostsThreadedPagedFromChild
tools.description: Returns a thread of posts starting at the topicId of the input childPostId, optionally returning replies to those posts as well as the original parent.

tools.name: forum.getRecruitmentThreadSummaries
tools.description: Allows the caller to get a list of to 25 recruitment thread summary information objects.

tools.name: forum.getTopicForContent
tools.description: Gets the post Id for the given content item's comments, if it exists.

tools.name: forum.getTopicsPaged
tools.description: Get topics from any forum.

tools.name: getAvailableLocales.getOperation
tools.description: List of available localization cultures

tools.name: globalAlerts.getGlobalAlerts
tools.description: Gets any active global alert for display in the forum banners, help pages, etc. Usually used for DOC alerts.

tools.name: groupV2.abdicateFoundership
tools.description: An administrative method to allow the founder of a group or clan to give up their position to another admin permanently.

tools.name: groupV2.addOptionalConversation
tools.description: Add a new optional conversation/chat channel. Requires admin permissions to the group.

tools.name: groupV2.approveAllPending
tools.description: Approve all of the pending users for the given group.

tools.name: groupV2.approvePending
tools.description: Approve the given membershipId to join the group/clan as long as they have applied.

tools.name: groupV2.approvePendingForList
tools.description: Approve all of the pending users for the given group.

tools.name: groupV2.banMember
tools.description: Bans the requested member from the requested group for the specified period of time.

tools.name: groupV2.denyAllPending
tools.description: Deny all of the pending users for the given group.

tools.name: groupV2.denyPendingForList
tools.description: Deny all of the pending users for the given group that match the passed-in .

tools.name: groupV2.editClanBanner
tools.description: Edit an existing group's clan banner. You must have suitable permissions in the group to perform this operation. All fields are required.

tools.name: groupV2.editFounderOptions
tools.description: Edit group options only available to a founder. You must have suitable permissions in the group to perform this operation.

tools.name: groupV2.editGroup
tools.description: Edit an existing group. You must have suitable permissions in the group to perform this operation. This latest revision will only edit the fields you pass in - pass null for properties you want to leave unaltered.

tools.name: groupV2.editGroupMembership
tools.description: Edit the membership type of a given member. You must have suitable permissions in the group to perform this operation.

tools.name: groupV2.editOptionalConversation
tools.description: Edit the settings of an optional conversation/chat channel. Requires admin permissions to the group.

tools.name: groupV2.getAdminsAndFounderOfGroup
tools.description: Get the list of members in a given group who are of admin level or higher.

tools.name: groupV2.getAvailableAvatars
tools.description: Returns a list of all available group avatars for the signed-in user.

tools.name: groupV2.getAvailableThemes
tools.description: Returns a list of all available group themes.

tools.name: groupV2.getBannedMembersOfGroup
tools.description: Get the list of banned members in a given group. Only accessible to group Admins and above. Not applicable to all groups. Check group features.

tools.name: groupV2.getGroup
tools.description: Get information about a specific group of the given ID.

tools.name: groupV2.getGroupByName
tools.description: Get information about a specific group with the given name and type.

tools.name: groupV2.getGroupByNameV2
tools.description: Get information about a specific group with the given name and type. The POST version.

tools.name: groupV2.getGroupOptionalConversations
tools.description: Gets a list of available optional conversation channels and their settings.

tools.name: groupV2.getGroupsForMember
tools.description: Get information about the groups that a given member has joined.

tools.name: groupV2.getInvitedIndividuals
tools.description: Get the list of users who have been invited into the group.

tools.name: groupV2.getMembersOfGroup
tools.description: Get the list of members in a given group.

tools.name: groupV2.getPendingMemberships
tools.description: Get the list of users who are awaiting a decision on their application to join a given group. Modified to include application info.

tools.name: groupV2.getPotentialGroupsForMember
tools.description: Get information about the groups that a given member has applied to or been invited to.

tools.name: groupV2.getRecommendedGroups
tools.description: Gets groups recommended for you based on the groups to whom those you follow belong.

tools.name: groupV2.getUserClanInviteSetting
tools.description: Gets the state of the user's clan invite preferences for a particular membership type - true if they wish to be invited to clans, false otherwise.

tools.name: groupV2.groupSearch
tools.description: Search for Groups.

tools.name: groupV2.individualGroupInvite
tools.description: Invite a user to join this group.

tools.name: groupV2.individualGroupInviteCancel
tools.description: Cancels a pending invitation to join a group.

tools.name: groupV2.kickMember
tools.description: Kick a member from the given group, forcing them to reapply if they wish to re-join the group. You must have suitable permissions in the group to perform this operation.

tools.name: groupV2.recoverGroupForFounder
tools.description: Allows a founder to manually recover a group they can see in game but not on bungie.net

tools.name: groupV2.unbanMember
tools.description: Unbans the requested member, allowing them to re-apply for membership.

tools.name: settings.getCommonSettings
tools.description: Get the common settings used by the Bungie.Net environment.

tools.name: social.acceptFriendRequest
tools.description: Accepts a friend relationship with the target user. The user must be on your incoming friend request list, though no error will occur if they are not.

tools.name: social.declineFriendRequest
tools.description: Declines a friend relationship with the target user. The user must be on your incoming friend request list, though no error will occur if they are not.

tools.name: social.getFriendList
tools.description: Returns your Bungie Friend list

tools.name: social.getFriendRequestList
tools.description: Returns your friend request queue.

tools.name: social.getPlatformFriendList
tools.description: Gets the platform friend of the requested type, with additional information if they have Bungie accounts. Must have a recent login session with said platform.

tools.name: social.issueFriendRequest
tools.description: Requests a friend relationship with the target user. Any of the target user's linked membership ids are valid inputs.

tools.name: social.removeFriend
tools.description: Remove a friend relationship with the target user. The user must be on your friend list, though no error will occur if they are not.

tools.name: social.removeFriendRequest
tools.description: Remove a friend relationship with the target user. The user must be on your outgoing request friend list, though no error will occur if they are not.

tools.name: tokens.applyMissingPartnerOffersWithoutClaim
tools.description: Apply a partner offer to the targeted user. This endpoint does not claim a new offer, but any already claimed offers will be applied to the game if not already.

tools.name: tokens.claimPartnerOffer
tools.description: Claim a partner offer as the authenticated user.

tools.name: tokens.forceDropsRepair
tools.description: Twitch Drops self-repair function - scans twitch for drops not marked as fulfilled and resyncs them.

tools.name: tokens.getBungieRewardsForPlatformUser
tools.description: Returns the bungie rewards for the targeted user when a platform membership Id and Type are used.

tools.name: tokens.getBungieRewardsForUser
tools.description: Returns the bungie rewards for the targeted user.

tools.name: tokens.getBungieRewardsList
tools.description: Returns a list of the current bungie rewards

tools.name: tokens.getPartnerOfferSkuHistory
tools.description: Returns the partner sku and offer history of the targeted user. Elevated permissions are required to see users that are not yourself.

tools.name: tokens.getPartnerRewardHistory
tools.description: Returns the partner rewards history of the targeted user, both partner offers and Twitch drops.

tools.name: trending.getTrendingCategories
tools.description: Returns trending items for Bungie.net, collapsed into the first page of items per category. For pagination within a category, call GetTrendingCategory.

tools.name: trending.getTrendingCategory
tools.description: Returns paginated lists of trending items for a category.

tools.name: trending.getTrendingEntryDetail
tools.description: Returns the detailed results for a specific trending entry. Note that trending entries are uniquely identified by a combination of *both* the TrendingEntryType *and* the identifier: the identifier alone is not guaranteed to be globally unique.

tools.name: user.getAvailableThemes
tools.description: Returns a list of all available user themes.

tools.name: user.getBungieNetUserById
tools.description: Loads a bungienet user by membership id.

tools.name: user.getCredentialTypesForTargetAccount
tools.description: Returns a list of credential types attached to the requested account

tools.name: user.getMembershipDataById
tools.description: Returns a list of accounts associated with the supplied membership ID and membership type. This will include all linked accounts (even when hidden) if supplied credentials permit it.

tools.name: user.getMembershipDataForCurrentUser
tools.description: Returns a list of accounts associated with signed in user. This is useful for OAuth implementations that do not give you access to the token response.

tools.name: user.getMembershipFromHardLinkedCredential
tools.description: Gets any hard linked membership given a credential. Only works for credentials that are public (just SteamID64 right now). Cross Save aware.

tools.name: user.getSanitizedPlatformDisplayNames
tools.description: Gets a list of all display names linked to this membership id but sanitized (profanity filtered). Obeys all visibility rules of calling user and is heavily cached.

tools.name: user.searchByGlobalNamePost
tools.description: Given the prefix of a global display name, returns all users who share that name.

tools.name: user.searchByGlobalNamePrefix
tools.description: [OBSOLETE] Do not use this to search users, use SearchByGlobalNamePost instead.

tools.name: userSystemOverrides.getUserSystemOverrides
tools.description: Get the user-specific system overrides that should be respected alongside common systems.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
